query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `after_sales_status_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `serviceId` int NOT NULL,
  `previousStatus` enum('NEW','ANALYZING','INFO_REQUIRED','QUOTE_PENDING','PAYMENT_CONFIRMED','PREPARING','SHIPPED','RESOLVED','CLOSED','IN_PROGRESS','WAITING_PARTS'),
  `newStatus` enum('NEW','ANALYZING','INFO_REQUIRED','QUOTE_PENDING','PAYMENT_CONFIRMED','PREPARING','SHIPPED','RESOLVED','CLOSED','IN_PROGRESS','WAITING_PARTS') NOT NULL,
  `changedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `reason` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `after_sales_status_history_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE INDEX `serviceId_history_idx` ON `after_sales_status_history` (`serviceId`);
